caption:
[Announcement of Top Board Committees for the Term 2025/2026]

We are delighted to reveal the new Top Board Committees of the MMU Accounting Club, Melaka Campus for the 2025/2026 term! The heartiest congratulation to all the dedicated individuals who will stepping into leadership roles and leading the club towards another year of growth and excellence.

Here is the official line-up:

President: Soh Jing En
Vice Presidents: Cathrine Tan & Hoo Jia Rou

Internal Secretary: So Yu Xuan
Assistant Internal Secretaries: Ho Min Yi & Nicole Tee Jia Xin

External Secretary: Wong Weng Kei
Assistant External Secretary: Tang Ee Chen

Treasurer: Woo Jie Hui

Head of Publicity & Multimedia: Tan Mei Xuan
Assistant Head of Publicity & Multimedia: Chong Wen Xin

Head of Sponsorship: Sya Farein b. Azman
Assistant Head of Sponsorship: Pasumitha Krishnamoorthy

Together, we are committed to working with passion, integrity and teamwork. With the continuous support of all members, we believe this term will be meaningful, impactful and memorable.
Let’s make it a remarkable year for the MMU Accounting Club!

Best Regards,
MMU Accounting Club Top Board 2025/2026

caption:
[Extension period of 24th N-IVAQ Committee Recruitment]
Great news! 🎉
The committee recruitment for the 24th National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ) has been extended.

This is your chance to be part of a dedicated and passionate team behind one of Malaysia’s longest-running accounting competitions. Successful committee members will receive a certificate endorsed by the Malaysian Institute of Accountants (MIA).

We welcome all enthusiastic and aspiring candidates to register by 16 January 2026, 11.59pm.

Don’t miss this opportunity to gain valuable experience and contribute to a national-level event.
We can’t wait to receive your application!

To register:
Scan the QR code or click the link below:
https://forms.gle/1VumD1VtiX7un8xm9
Interview will be conducted physically, further details will be announced soon.

🌙✨ Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri! 

May this festival bring you countless blessings and happiness💚✨

MMU Accounting Club wishes all our Muslim friends a blessed and joyful Eid al-Fitr!

✨Decode the Challenges, Define your Excellence. ✨ 
Are you ready to be part of our committees for the upcoming 24th N-IVAQ? 

In collaboration with the Malaysian Institute of Accountants (MIA), the Multimedia University Accounting Club Melaka will be organising the 24th National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ) 2026. This event has been proudly hosted by the MMU Accounting Club (Melaka Campus) since 2001.

N-IVAQ is a nationwide competition endorsed by MIA which is open to all Accounting students currently pursuing full-time undergraduate degrees or diploma programmes in universities, colleges, and educational institutions across Malaysia. It serves as a platform for students to apply their accounting knowledge and contributes towards the development of accounting standards in Malaysia.

🎯 The Qualifying Round and Final Round of the 24th N-IVAQ 2026 will be held in May 2026 at Multimedia University Melaka Campus.
We are now recruiting High Committees & Sub Committees for the 24th N-IVAQ 2026.
Available Positions:
- Quiz Protocol
- Public Relations
- Technical
- Programme
- Special Task

Committee involvement enhances students’ understanding of the accounting profession through hands-on experience and collaboration. It also offers an excellent opportunity to connect with accounting bodies and institutions across Malaysia. Most significantly, an MIA endorsed appreciation certificate will be awarded to all committee members.

⏳ Spots are limited, the recruitment form will close on 11th January 2026 (Sunday), 11:59pm.
Further details of the interview will be sent to potential applicants later.

🔗 Application Link:
https://forms.gle/1VumD1VtiX7un8xm9

For any enquiries, kindly get in touch with:
Soh Jing En +60 11-5159 7521
Cathrine Tan +60 18-381 0729
Hoo Jia Rou +60 12-773 8339

Step into the new year with courage and confidence.
May the Year of the Horse 🐎 bring you health, happiness, and all the blessings you wish for.

Gong Xi Fa Cai! 🧨
Warm wishes from MMU Accounting Club.

We look forward to seeing each division contribute their expertise and teamwork in making this year’s N-IVAQ a remarkable milestone. 💫

Warm regards,

[24th National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ) Registration Extended]

Don’t miss the opportunity to add an outstanding achievement to your resume‼️ 

Apply now via the QR code or link below ⬇️:

The MMU Accounting Club will be organizing the MMU-ICAEW Student Conference 2025, which will be held at the Exam Hall of Multimedia University, Malacca Campus. 

This event aims to provide a platform for accounting students to deepen their understanding of current industry trends, enhance their professional skills, and engage with experienced practitioners and peers from the Institute of Chartered Accountants in England and Wales (ICAEW) in the field of accounting.

We warmly welcome students of MMU Malacca Campus to apply as committee members in various divisions to contribute to the successful organisation of this esteemed campus-based conference held in collaboration with the Institute of Chartered Accountants in England and Wales (ICAEW).

Available Committee Divisions:
• Secretary
• Logistics
• Usher
• Technical
• Publicity & Multimedia

Joining the committee offers an excellent opportunity to gain practical experience in organising a professional-level event. Committee members will develop key skills such as leadership, communication, teamwork, and time management. Additionally, they will have the chance to network with accounting professionals and fellow students while gaining insights into event coordination and professional engagement.

Application Deadline: 22 June 2025

Details regarding the interview schedule will be communicated in due course.

Regards,
Multimedia University Accounting Club(MMUAC)

The MMU Accounting Club (MMUAC) is honored to announce that we will be organizing the MMU-ICAEW Student Conference 2025, right here on campus. This prestigious event is held in collaboration with the Institute of Chartered Accountants in England and Wales (ICAEW).

This conference offers a valuable opportunity to interact with professionals, alumni, and student leaders while exploring the importance of ethics and integrity in today’s rapidly evolving world. You will also gain insights into how Artificial Intelligence can support ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) goals when guided by strong ethical principles. As we move toward an increasingly digital future, this event will help you understand how to stay competitive, lead responsibly, and align your values with the expectations of modern industry.

We warmly welcome all future changemakers from every faculty to join this inspiring event. It is designed to help you develop critical skills employers are actively seeking. No matter your field of study, this conference provides practical insights to strengthen your career readiness, build in-demand skills, and stand out to recruiters in today’s competitive job market.

The details of the talk are as follows:
📅Date: 29th August 2025
🕒Time: 9:00 AM – 1:30 PM
📍Venue: MMU Malacca Campus, Exam Hall

Attention: This conference is open to all MMU students and is strongly recommended for final year students preparing to enter the workforce and plan their professional journey.

Register Now to Secure Your Spot! We look forward seeing you there!

Registration Link: https://forms.gle/U32F2ddgr6N62has6

Please note that the registration closes on 20th August 2025 at 11:59 PM (Wednesday)

🔊Free refreshments and lunch will be provided!

📝 Kickstart your career—register today and take the first step toward a rewarding journey!

For any inquiries, kindly contact:
Tey Kai Xuan: 016-988 1172
Tan Yong Kiat: 017-213 1413
Cathrine Tan: 018-381 0729

Thank you.

Best regards,
Multimedia University Accounting Club, Malacca Campus

Greetings from MMU Accounting Club!

We are excited to showcase our moderator and speakers of MMU-ICAEW Student Conference 2025!

Meet our speaker- [Ms.Molly]

Ms. Molly Wong is the General Manager of PwC Acceleration Center Kuala Lumpur (AC KL) and Partner of PwC Malaysia. She has 25 years of experience in PwC. She is responsible for providing strategic direction and leadership for AC KL, working closely with the Board of Directors, AC leadership and US stakeholders to enhance capabilities, operational efficiency, and service excellence. Ms. Molly aims to make AC KL a highly skilled talent hub with emerging technologies and a culture that brings out their best and collaborates with teams across the world. Ms. Molly is a fellow of ICAEW and member of MIA. She was a former Committee Member of the ICAEW Members Society, Malaysia Chapter from 2018 to 2023.

Greetings from MMU Accounting Club!

We are excited to showcase our moderator and speakers of MMU-ICAEW Student Conference 2025!

Meet the moderator- [Mr. Gerald Fernandez]

Mr. Gerald Fernandez is the Co-Founder & CEO of TAPRO. He brings over 25 years of experience in driving growth, strategic partnerships, and market expansion across Southeast Asia. Specializing in emerging markets, he builds sustainable frameworks that strengthen brand presence and align with local priorities. He has forged strong relationships with government, industry, and corporate stakeholders, enabling impactful collaboration. A hands-on leader and mentor, he empowers teams with the vision, resources, and strategies to achieve ambitious goals. Guided by his belief in purposeful education as a catalyst for change, Mr. Gerald Fernandez is dedicated to developing talent, nurturing future leaders, and creating lasting impact in the region.

Greetings from MMU Accounting Club!

We are excited to showcase our moderator and speakers of MMU-ICAEW Student Conference 2025!

Meet our speaker-[Mr. Junaidy]

Mr. Junaidy is the managing partner of JM & Co., Chartered Accountants. He is a fellow member of ICAEW and Malaysian Institute of Accountants (MIA). He holds a Bachelor's Degree in Accountancy (first class) from Cardiff University, UK. With over 25 years of experience, Mr. Junaidy has served and provided a diverse range of audit, accountancy and business advisory services across various industries. He commenced his career in London, UK specialising in audit and assurance services. He later joined PwC KL leading numerous audit and assurance engagements. He also served various companies such as Khazanah Nasional, MMC Corporation, CCM Berhad and others. Mr. Junaidy is currently a member of ICAEW Ethics Standards Committee in London, UK.

🚀 Register NOW — Your future starts here!
🤝 We welcome everyone on board!

We are honored and delighted to present our distinguished emcee for the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz(N-IVAQ), Tay Yi! 

With extensive experience and an unwavering dedication to excellence, Tay Yi will gracefully host this extraordinary occasion, infusing every moment with professionalism, poise, and vibrant energy. Together, let us craft an unforgettable experience and make this day truly exceptional for all.💫🎙️

We also wish to express our deepest gratitude to Tay Yi—her support and enthusiasm are the cornerstone of this event’s success and significance. Thank you for joining us in this memorable celebration!

Introducing the Speaker for the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ) – Mr. Daniel Lee

We are honored to welcome Mr. Daniel Lee as Speaker for this year’s N-IVAQ.

Mr. Daniel Lee, FCCA, CA(M), is a highly experienced professional in the field of accountancy and education. He is a Fellow of the Association of Chartered Certified Accountants (FCCA) and a Chartered Accountant with the Malaysian Institute of Accountants [CA(M)]. Remarkably, he passed all four final ACCA papers in a single sitting on his first attempt—an achievement earned by only about 8% of candidates worldwide.

With over 28 years of experience in education and training, Mr. Daniel has played a pivotal role in setting up professional accountancy programmes across various universities and colleges, both locally and internationally. 

We extend our heartfelt thanks to Mr. Daniel Lee for his valuable role as a speaker at the 23rd N-IVAQ. His expertise, passion, and commitment greatly contributed to the event’s success, and we sincerely appreciate his support.

[Announcement: 23rd National Inter-varsity Accounting Quiz Grand Reveal]

We’re thrilled to announce that the competition begins soon! Get ready to join the excitement, showcase your skills, and challenge against bright minds.

"Master the number, Chart your success!"

Selamat Hari Merdeka! 🎆✨
Let’s come together as proud Malaysians to celebrate our nation’s independence. May we continue to uphold unity, harmony, and progress! 🎉💙❤️

Introducing the Judge for the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ) – Mr. Ong Lu Yuan. We are honored to welcome Mr.
Ong Lu Yuan as Judge for this year’s N-IVAQ.

He is primarily involved in property development since his completion of the ICAEW qualification in 2000.

He has completed more than a thousand units of residential / commercial properties, mostly located in the state of Melaka over the years.
In the meantime, he assisted Universiti Malaya, Universiti Sains Malaysia and Multimedia University with the data analytics software which has been embedded into the university’s curriculum. He is also an Audit Committee Chair for a listed company on KLSE.

We extend our heartfelt thanks to Mr. Ong Lu Yuan for his valuable role as a judge at the 23rd N-IVAQ. His expertise, passion, and commitment greatly contributed to the event’s success, and we sincerely appreciate his support.

Introducing the Judge for the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ) – Mr. Shaun Lee. We are honored to welcome Mr. Shaun Lee as Judge for thisyear’s N-IVAQ.

Mr Shaun Lee is a licensed auditor , tax agent and HRD Corp accredited trainer. He has over 20 years of
experience in tax advisory, auditing and corporate
matters. He is currently the Managing Partner of Lee & Lim PLT (Chartered Accountants ), Managing Director of Lee & Lim Tax Consultants Sdn Bhd and Talent Training Academy Sdn Bhd. He is also the independent director and nomination committee chairman of HPP Holdings Berhad. 

Mr Shaun is member of the Malaysian Institute of Accountants, CPA Australia,Chartered Tax Institute of Malaysia, The Malaysian Institute of Certified Public Accountant and The Institute of Internal Auditors Malaysia.

Mr Shaun is currently the President of the Malaysia China Chamber of Commerce Melaka Branch , Director of Malacca Chinese Chamber of Commerce , Chairman for SJKC Ting Hwa and President of Persatuan Kebajikan Ji Ping Melaka.

We extend our heartfelt thanks to Mr. Shaun Lee for
his valuable role as a judge at the 23rd N-IVAQ. His
expertise, passion, and commitment greatly
contributed to the event’s success, and we sincerely
appreciate his support.

Introducing the Speaker for the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ) – Mr. Firdani Adam

We are honored to welcome Mr. Firdani Adam as a Speaker for this year’s N-IVAQ.

Mr. Firdani Adam is currently serving as the Business Development Manager at TYMBA Education, where he plays a vital role in driving educational growth and professional accountancy awareness. With over five
years of experience at the Malaysia Professional Accountancy Centre (MyPAC), including roles as Business Development Senior Executive and Market Development Executive, Mr. Firdani has been instrumental in bridging the gap between aspiring accountants and professional qualifications.
Holding both a Master’s and a Bachelor’s degree in
Political Science from the International Islamic University Malaysia, Mr. Firdani brings a unique blend of academic depth and industry insight.

His dedication to promoting education as a pathway to success is evident through his strategic initiatives and ongoing engagement with students across the country.

We extend our heartfelt thanks to Mr. Firdani Adam for his valuable contribution as a speaker at the 23rd N-IVAQ. His commitment, insights, and passion for education significantly enriched the event, and we sincerely appreciate his support.

We are honored and delighted to present our distinguished emcee for the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz(N-IVAQ), Tan Heng Rui! 

With extensive experience and an unwavering dedication to excellence, Heng Rui will gracefully host this extraordinary occasion, infusing every moment with professionalism, poise, and vibrant energy. Together, let us craft an unforgettable experience and make this day truly exceptional for all.💫🎙️

We also wish to express our deepest gratitude to Tan Heng Rui—his support and enthusiasm are the cornerstone of this event’s success and significance. Thank you for joining us in this memorable celebration!

Introducing the Speaker for the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ) – Mr. Andrew

We are honored to welcome Mr. Andrew as Speaker for this year’s N-IVAQ.
Mr. Andrew has risen through the ranks in ICAEW Malaysia starting as a senior executive in 2017. In 2024 he has held the role as Lead for Student Recruitment in ICAEW Malaysia. Over the number of years, he has seen many students qualify as an ICAEW Chartered Accountant. Having a passion for students seeking jobs, he enjoys telling stories with ICAEW Members to encourage students to take on the ICAEW ACA qualification. Additionally, he collaborates with employers for university engagements that allows students to be exposed to job opportunities they seek.

We extend our heartfelt thanks to Mr. Andrew for his valuable role as a speaker at the 23rd N-IVAQ. His expertise, passion, and commitment greatly contributed to the event’s success, and we sincerely appreciate his support.

Introducing the Judge for the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ) – Mr.Kian Seong Ang We are honored to welcome Mr. Kian Seong Ang as Judge for this year’s N-IVAQ.

 Mr. Kian Seong Ang is a Senior Manager in the Assurance Services division of PwC in Malaysia, with over 20 years of experience in delivering audit and business advisory services to both public and privately held companies. His industry expertise spans manufacturing, property development, construction, plantation, and services. Kian Seong is a Fellow of the Association of Chartered Certified Accountants (ACCA), a member of the Malaysian Institute of Accountants (MIA), and holds a Bachelor of Management Studies (Hons) in Accounting from The University of Waikato, New Zealand.

We extend our heartfelt thanks to Mr.Kian Seong Ang for his valuable role as a judge at the 23rd N-IVAQ. His expertise, passion, and commitment greatly contributed to the event’s success, and we sincerely appreciate his support.

Introducing the Judge for the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ) – MrJason Chia Wee Kiat. We are honored to welcome Mr Jason Chia Wee Kiat as Chief Judge for this year’s N-IVAQ.

Mr Jason Chia Wee Kiat is an experienced audit professional with over 10 years in financial auditing, tax compliance, and regulatory reporting. A member of ACCA and the Malaysian Institute of Accountants, he has led audits across various sectors, including healthcare, construction, and telecommunications. Jason has been instrumental in implementing MFRS and MPERS standards, particularly MFRS 15, 9, and 16. Known for his analytical skills and collaborative approach, he has also been recognised as a top trainer at Ernst & Young for three years, demonstrating his commitment to coaching and talent development.

We extend our heartfelt thanks to Mr.Jason Chia Wee Kiat for his valuable role as a judge at the 23rd N-IVAQ. His expertise, passion, and commitment greatly contributed to the event’s success, and we sincerely appreciate his support.

[Announcing the Top 10 Finalists ] 

We're thrilled to unveil the top 10 finalists of the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ)!

🌟 Meet the Finalists:
University Malaya- G003
Swinburne University of Technology Sarawak-E002
University Malaya-F004
University Putra Malaysia-F003
University Selangor-G001
Taylor’s University-I004
Taylor’s University- G004
Multimedia University- G002
Peninsula College- A002
Asia Pacific University of Technology-E001

👏 Congratulations to all the finalists! Your dedication and expertise have set a new standard in the accounting profession.

For your information the final round of the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ) will be held at 31st May 2025 (Saturday), at MMU Melaka, Main Hall.
Thank you and stay tuned!

Future Accountants! 🚀 Term 4, 2025 Enrolment for the MICPA x CA ANZ Qualifying Programme is OPENING SOON! Want to become a future-ready & tech-savvy accountant with a dual qualification? This is your chance to level up your career globally with MICPA & CA ANZ! 🌍✨

📅 Enrolment Period: Jul 29 - Aug 14

For more info click here www.micpacaanz.com

#theMICPA #CAANZ #BeReadyForReal

Happy Labour Day! 💼

Honouring the dedication, resilience, and hard work of every worker who keeps our world moving forward. Wishing everyone a restful and meaningful Labour Day. 💪🌿

We are proud to present BPP Publishing Holdings as the Diamond sponsor of the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ)! 🎉

From BPP beginnings nearly 40 years ago, BPP Learning Media has become the benchmark for quality in professional education study materials.

As the publishing arm of BPP, tutors and students in approximately 150 countries worldwide look to BPP Learning Media as an essential support for success in accountancy, tax, financial services, business management, marketing and medical exams.

BPP Professional Education as part of BPP was founded in 1976 and is Europe's largest professional education and training company including accountancy, tax, law, actuarial, HR and investment management.

DL Training Consultancy (DLTC) is an authorised BPP distributor for more than 10 years. DLTC have supported students and ACCA Approved Learning Partners both Public & Private Universities with BPP study materials and BPP's Enhanced Classroom (ECR).

The MMU Accounting Club (Melaka Campus) sincerely thanks for their commitment and generous support 🤝. It is a privilege to have them on board for this significant event 📚✨.

🌸 Happy Wesak Day! 🙏✨
May this holy day bring peace, wisdom, and enlightenment to all. Let’s take a moment to reflect, spread kindness, and continue to walk the path of compassion. 🌿💛

We are proud to present MIA (Malaysian Institute of Accountants) as the co-organizer of the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ)! 🎉

MIA is a statutory body established under the Accountants Act 1967, with a mandate to regulate and develop the accountancy profession in Malaysia in support of nation building.
MIA accords the Chartered Accountant Malaysia or “C.A.(M)” designation. Working closely alongside businesses, MIA connects its membership to a wide range of information and resources, events, professional development and networking opportunities.
Presently, there are more than 40,000 members making their strides in businesses across all industries in Malaysia and around the world.
MIA’s international outlook and connections are reflected in its membership of regional and international professional organisations such as the ASEAN Federation of Accountants (AFA), and the International Federation of Accountants (IFAC).

The MMU Accounting Club (Melaka Campus) sincerely thanks for their commitment and generous support 🤝. It is a privilege to have them on board for this significant event 📚✨.

💼 Happy Labour Day! 🏆🎉
Today, we celebrate the hard work, dedication, and perseverance of every worker who contributes to society. Take a break, recharge, and keep striving for excellence! 💪✨
